data.title: validate.sh: CI gate caches stale failure baseline — reports FAIL after CI recovers
data.description:
## Problem

The CI gate in validate.sh caches a ci-baseline file in /tmp/ that records the most recent CI status. Once a failure is cached, subsequent runs continue reporting ci: FAIL even after CI has recovered. The baseline file gets re-created from the old failure run during each validate.sh invocation.

## Expected Behavior

CI gate should reflect current CI status, not a cached historical failure.

## Actual Behavior

ci: FAIL persists across validation runs even after 4+ consecutive passing CI runs.

## Severity

P3 — transient state issue; causes confusion during /dso:debug-everything sessions.
